task_description: Add API Gateway level authorizers (Cognito User Pool Authorizer for ICognitoAuthentication, Lambda token authorizer for IJwtAuthentication) to the RestApi construct. Inject authorizer configuration into the OpenAPI spec's securityDefinitions with x-amazon-apigateway-authorizer extensions. The Lambda handler continues doing fine-grained claims/groups validation.

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation passes (npx projen compile). All 28 tests pass (7 test suites). Tests exercise the new code paths: Cognito authorizer injection, JWT Lambda authorizer creation, no-auth backward compat, and per-operation security distribution.
